content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + DIRECT OBJECT + PARTICLE + PREPOSITION + OBJECT. CanDo: Can use a direct object with some prepositional verbs as well as an object of the preposition.
chinese_human_name: 三词短语动词：动词+直接宾语+小品词+介词+介词宾语
examples: It is widely accepted that being a loyal and trusted individual means that the people around us can trust us or let us in on a secret.
trigger_lemmas: let in on、trust with、remind of、accuse of
keywords: 三词短语动词,直接宾语,小品词,介词宾语,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WOULD HATE' + 'TO'. CanDo: Can use 'would hate' + 'to' infinitive, for emphasis.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 情态动词短语：would hate + to不定式（强调用法）
examples: We in the student committee would hate to see all that space go to waste.、I am very much aware of my parents’ mistakes and would hate to make the same ones.
trigger_lemmas: would hate to、would hate to see、would hate to make、would hate to think
keywords: would hate,to不定式,强调用法,情态动词短语,情感表达

content: Guideword: FORM: ELLIPSIS. CanDo: Can form alternative questions with two or more clauses and ellipsis in the second or third clause.
chinese_human_name: 选择疑问句：多从句省略结构
examples: Is it not better to take the television away or stop them going to the cinema?、Do you enjoy reading, find it a waste of time or have an indifferent attitude to it?、Is he going to give it back to me or show it to everybody?
keywords: 选择疑问句,省略结构,多从句,连接词or,高级语法

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NEGATIVE QUESTIONS WITH 'NOT', EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can form negative questions with uncontracted 'not' to emphasise a point in an argument.
chinese_human_name: 否定疑问句：使用未缩写的'not'进行强调
examples: Do we not want our children to be as happy as possible?、Is it not too easy to put the blame systematically on our education?、Is it not possible to have this, though maybe on a smaller scale, in our everyday living right where we spend the majority of our time on earth?、Are they not aware of the negative effects the use of cars has on cities?、Can it not, sometimes, be harmful to the world?
keywords: 否定疑问句,未缩写的not,强调,辩论,正式语境

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'THAT … OF'. CanDo: Can use 'that … of' + possessive pronouns to express an attitude about someone or something, often in humorous or sarcastic contexts.
chinese_human_name: 表达态度结构：that ... of + 物主代词
examples: I could just imagine it, meeting her at her house, her mother asking me to take care of her between puffs of smoke and coughing fits in that hoarse voice of hers.、I kept silent when I was introduced to that new girlfriend of his.、You can park that precious jeep of yours.、I've been looking all over for that bright great-nephew of mine.
trigger_lemmas: that ... of、of mine、of yours、of his、of hers
keywords: that ... of 结构,物主代词,态度表达,幽默语气,讽刺表达

content: Guideword: FORM: 'HIS'. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronoun 'his', with singular and plural reference, in subject and object position, and complement positions after 'be' and after prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 物主代词'his'的全面用法：单复数指代与多位置应用
examples: Therefore, his was not a happy and normal childhood.、He was my confidant and I was his.、It was as if she had completely forgotten about the outlines of his face, his hair, all the features that were his.、Bob attracts many of his students to the teaching career, which is rather looked down on in a developing poor country like his.
keywords: 物主代词,所有格,单数指代,复数指代,语法位置

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THEIRS' AS SUBJECT. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronoun 'theirs', with singular and plural reference, in subject position.
chinese_human_name: 物主代词'theirs'作主语：单复数指代与用法详解
examples: Theirs is a relationship between two members of the privileged classes, who really don't care about the world around (or below) them.、Theirs had always been a love-and-hate relationship.、Yet, beautiful dreams never last long, and theirs lasted until she had to leave England.、When comparing the value and achievements of athletes with doctors or scientists, theirs begin to lack in significance.
keywords: 物主代词,theirs,主语位置,单复数指代,所有权

content: Guideword: FORM: 'HERS' AS SUBJECT. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronoun 'hers' with singular reference, in subject position.
chinese_human_name: 物主代词'hers'作主语：单数指代与主语位置用法
examples: I put Sophie's pictures in my bag because hers was already packed.、[talking about gazpacho, a type of soup] I also recall my father saying to my mother that hers was not as good as my grandmother's.、She thought, as she sometimes did, that hers was a drab existence, but that she could do hardly anything to avoid it.
keywords: 物主代词,hers,主语位置,单数指代,替代功能

content: Guideword: FORM: OF 'THEIRS', 'HERS', 'HIS'. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronouns 'hers', 'theirs' and 'his' after noun + 'of'.
chinese_human_name: 名词+of+物主代词：hers/theirs/his的用法
examples: I was a great admirer of hers.、She asked some old friends of hers and she went to the church where the marriage was taking place.、My parents invited the father of a friend of theirs who spoke French.、Then he showed me a very old diary of his, just for me to have an idea of what to do.、He was able to build a very successful business which allowed him and his family to live very well and to travel (a passion of his).
trigger_lemmas: a friend of、an admirer of、a passion of
keywords: 物主代词,hers,theirs,his,名词+of结构

content: Guideword: USE: DISCOURSE MARKERS. CanDo: Can use 'as for myself' as a discourse marker to introduce or focus on a personal opinion.
chinese_human_name: 话语标记语：as for myself 用于引出个人观点
examples: As for myself, as you can clearly see from my account of this musical event, music still means an awful lot to me, and most probably allways will.、As for myself I like taking responsibilities.、As for myself, I grew up during the "internet era", the years when it was spreading to average peoples homes and therefore I can still remember life without it.
keywords: 话语标记语,个人观点,焦点强调,正式场合,对比表达

content: Guideword: FORM: (SUBJECT) CLEFT CONSTRUCTIONS WITH 'IT'. CanDo: Can form a cleft construction beginning with 'it' to emphasise the subject of the main clause. ► clauses
chinese_human_name: 强调主语的it分裂句结构
examples: It was my father who took all this away from me.
keywords: it分裂句,强调结构,主语强调,关系代词,焦点信息

content: Guideword: FORM: 'A LOT' AND 'MUCH'. CanDo: Can use 'a lot' and 'much' as a subject pronouns. ► focus
chinese_human_name: 数量代词作主语：'a lot'与'much'的用法
examples: A lot has changed since prehistoric times.、A lot depends on your background.、Much has been said about the need for nuclear weapons, although after the end of USSR and consequently the end of the cold war, this topic was almost forgotten.、Much has been said about quality time, but children don't understand this concept, they only know whether you are there or you are not.
trigger_lemmas: a lot、much、has changed、depends on、has been said
keywords: 数量代词,主语,a lot,much,谓语动词单数

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'MANY ARE THE' + NOUN, FOR FOCUS. CanDo: Can form complex noun phrases using an inverted form 'Many' + 'are' + noun phrase, followed by a relative clause, as a focusing device.  ► focus
chinese_human_name: 倒装强调结构：'Many are the' + 名词短语
examples: Many are the causes which have led us to a better and longer life.、Many are the examples of children who hate reading as they believe that it is pointless, but they are not able to judge from a young age.
trigger_lemmas: many are the、reasons why、examples of、people who
keywords: 倒装结构,强调数量,正式写作,关系从句,复数名词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THE ONE(S) THAT', FOR FOCUS. CanDo: Can use 'The one(s) that' + clause in subject position, for focus. ► focus
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: substitution, one, ones, none
chinese_human_name: 强调结构：'The one(s) that' + 从句作主语
examples: The one that impressed me a lot is the Chinese Lunar New Year Carnival which was held in Hong Kong in January this year.、The one that I think will have permanent results is the raising of the financial standard of all these countries.、The ones that he preferred were those where his imagination could fly away to other places and times, and where he could live the life of other people.、The ones that wear clothes made by their mothers never seem to ask for much attention.
trigger_lemmas: the one that、the ones that、for focus
keywords: 强调结构,主语位置,定语从句,焦点突出,正式语境

content: Guideword: FORM: 'EACH … THE OTHER(S)', AS OBJECT. CanDo: Can use 'each' (+ noun or pronoun) as subject followed by 'the other(s)' as object , to refer to two related things. ► pronouns: quantity
chinese_human_name: 相互代词结构：each ... the other(s) 作宾语
examples: Each of them admires the other's intelligence.、As regards other aspects of my upbringing my parents taught me the importance of having all the family together, each one helping the others, each one loving the others.
keywords: 相互代词,each,the other,the others,宾语结构

content: Guideword: USE: POLITENESS. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with verbs that are not usually used in this form to make statements and requests sound less direct.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时礼貌用法：用非典型动词表达委婉请求
examples: Considering the importance of the matter, I am asking for your financial support.、I'm asking permission to be excused from work for at least three days.、If we're wanting to make progress in prolonging the length of human lives, we equally have to be willing to spend time and make an effort...
keywords: 现在进行时,礼貌表达,委婉请求,静态动词,正式场合

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH ADVERBS OF INDEFINITE FREQUENCY. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with a wide range of adverbs of indefinite frequency, often to talk about surprising or undesirable situations or events.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时与不定频率副词搭配：表达持续或频繁行为
examples: … we are persistently asking ourselves questions about where we are from and why we are here.、During life we are permanently learning and increasing our knowledge.
keywords: 现在进行时,不定频率副词,持续性行为,主观评价,动词-ing形式

content: Guideword: USE: UNDESIRED EVENTS. CanDo: Can use the past continuous with 'always' or 'constantly' to talk about repeated events which are undesired or uncontrolled.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时搭配always/constantly表达不受欢迎或失控的重复事件
examples: They had been told that I was always getting into mischief and so had decided that, by buying me this diary, I would probably calm down a little and my behaviour would change.、I was constantly trying to balance my school life, extra-curricular activities, studies and personal life and was always running out of time.
keywords: 过去进行时,always,constantly,重复事件,负面情感

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 过去完成进行时疑问句：had been doing
examples: What had he been doing that morning?、So, why had she been waiting for so long a time?
trigger_lemmas: what had been doing、why had been waiting、how long had been
keywords: 过去完成进行时,疑问句,倒装结构,持续动词,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: FIXED EXPRESSIONS 'HAD IT NOT BEEN FOR', 'IF IT HADN'T BEEN FOR'. CanDo: Can use 'had it not been for' … and 'if it hadn’t been for' with a modal form for giving reasons.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时固定表达：'had it not been for'与'if it hadn't been for'
examples: Had it not been for the fact that I had already read the article, I would have thought that this woman was at least thirty years old.、Another aspect of his emotional side is the fact that he is a very private person, and had it not been for this feature, he might have been able to react differently.、If it hadn't been for my lack of knowledge, skills, experience, and some other things like that, I wouldn't have been fired.、They had become very good friends and their friendship could have gone a little further if it hadn't been for Dan's character.
trigger_lemmas: had it not been for、if it hadn't been for、would have、could have、might have
keywords: 过去完成时,虚拟语气,条件句,倒装结构,情态动词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: AFTER 'IF ONLY', IMAGINED PAST. CanDo: Can use the negative form after 'if only' to express regret.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时在'if only'后的否定形式：表达遗憾
examples: If only she had not changed, if only I had helped her, maybe we would still be best friends and I would not be sitting here, writing about her!、If only I hadn't been that rude!
keywords: if only,过去完成时,否定形式,虚拟语气,表达遗憾,had not,过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM: INVERSION WITH 'HARDLY …WHEN'. CanDo: Can invert the subject and affirmative auxiliary verb with 'hardly … when' to talk about something that happened immediately before something else, in formal contexts.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时倒装结构：hardly … when
examples: Hardly had she spoken these words when it dawned on the musician that life could not continue like that.、Hardly had he taken them from the counter when the monster vanished again.
keywords: 倒装,过去完成时,hardly … when,正式英语,时间紧接

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: INVERSION. CanDo: Can invert the subject and affirmative auxiliary verb with 'not only … but' as a focusing device. ► focus ► inversion
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 倒装结构：Not only...but...与现在完成进行时的结合使用
examples: Not only have I been wandering its streets ever since I was ten, but I have also come to know most of the main characters of its history in the past 50 years.、Not only have I been expecting it for the last few months but I will also give some support to my wife, who has been feeling a little nervous these last weeks.
keywords: 倒装,not only...but...,现在完成进行时,强调结构,部分倒装

content: Guideword: USE: NEWSWORTHY. CanDo: Can use the present perfect simple to introduce news.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时简单式：新闻引入用法
examples: A new shopping centre has opened in our town.
keywords: 现在完成时简单式,新闻引入,过去分词,无具体时间,当前影响

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NON-FINITE PERFECT CLAUSES. CanDo: Can use passive non-finite '-ing' perfect forms in subordinate clauses to give explanatory background information.
chinese_human_name: 被动非限定完成式-ing从句：用于解释背景信息
examples: I myself, having been educated the hard way, would specifically insist on them getting the best possible school education.、Having been taught the rights and the wrongs, we had an idea about everything.、Not having been given precise orders from the top, as usual he decided to work on his own initiative.
keywords: 被动语态,非限定动词,完成式,-ing形式,状语从句

content: Guideword: FORM: NON-FINITE PERFECT COMPLEMENTS. CanDo: Can use non-finite '-ing' perfect forms of the passive as the complement of prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 被动语态非谓语完成式作介词补语：having been + 过去分词
examples: They are expected to give the couple expensive presents as a reward for having been invited.、We caught the bus as if we were escaping from Saigon, and with the sensation of having been rewarded with one of the funniest holiday evenings of our lives.、Miss Kenton has just been employed as a housekeeper when she knocks on Stevens' pantry door and comes in without having been bidden to do so, bringing a vase of flowers.
trigger_lemmas: for having been、without having been、with the sensation of having been、after having been
keywords: 被动语态,非谓语动词,完成式,介词补语,having been

content: Guideword: PRESENT PERFECT CONTINUOUS COMMENT. CanDo:
chinese_human_name: 现在完成进行时被动语态：形式与用法详解
trigger_lemmas: has been being、have been being、for months、since last year
keywords: 现在完成进行时被动语态,have been being,过去分词,持续性动作,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'HAVE' + OBJECT + INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use 'have' + object + infinitive without 'to' to talk about asking or causing someone to do something, often in formal contexts.
category: SuperCategory: PASSIVES. SubCategory: get and have
chinese_human_name: 使役结构：have + 宾语 + 动词原形（不带to）
examples: In order to attract people and have them practise their English, we could point out the benefits and the possibilities one obtains, by acquiring a degree in this language ...、In assessing the prospective student's linguistic skills it does not suffice to just have him fill out a multiple-choice-form
trigger_lemmas: have someone do、have something done、have the committee、have participants
keywords: 使役动词,动词原形,正式语境,宾语前置,不带to不定式

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPLEX NOUN PHRASES WITH 'LITTLE OR NO'  + NOUN. CanDo: Can form complex noun phrases with 'little or no' + noun.
chinese_human_name: 复杂名词短语：'little or no' + 名词结构
examples: Harvey Keitel has always chosen the scripts that interested him as a person and as an actor, whilst refusing to invest his talent in big-time Hollywood block-busters with little or no artistic value.、They have little or no spare time to relax and recharge their batteries; they are constantly under pressure in order to live up to the expectations of the team and the supporters.、The careers of these people started at a very young age with little or no money.
trigger_lemmas: little or no、with little or no、have little or no
keywords: 复杂名词短语,little or no,数量表达,高级修饰语,正式文体

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NOT A' + NOUN, EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use 'not a' + noun, often with a following  passive structure, for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 强调否定结构：'not a' + 名词 + 被动语态
examples: Not a single noise could be heard from inside of any of the rooms.、Not a long time passes before another Polish city, Warsaw, hosts a festival.、Not a single member of the group would have imagined that the "Luxury coach" would break down and leave them stranded in the middle of nowhere.
trigger_lemmas: not a single、not a、not one、not a trace
keywords: 强调否定,完全否定,被动语态,句首倒装,不定冠词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'DON'T YOU …', WARNING. CanDo: Can use a negative imperative form with 'you' to give a warning or reprimand.
chinese_human_name: 否定祈使句警告用法：Don't you...
examples: Don't you ever do that again!、Don't you dare!、Don't you dare forget me, I want letters from you promptly, understand!
trigger_lemmas: don't you、don't you ever、don't you dare
keywords: 否定祈使句,警告,责备,Don't you,语气强调

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NEITHER'. CanDo: Can use 'Neither' or 'Nor' + with 'do' or 'be' + inverted subject to add to a previous related negative clause, to focus on an additional negative factor.
chinese_human_name: 否定结构：Neither/Nor + do/be + 倒装主语
examples: There are also considerable disturbances during day-time. It is, for example, not possible to lead a conversation, e.g. on the veranda, without shouting. Nor is it possible to watch television peacefully without the thunderous noise in the background.、At first, I didn’t pay attention to the large number of magazines and newspapers she subscribed to. Neither did I oppose her 'need' to get new clothes every month.
keywords: Neither,Nor,倒装,否定句,助动词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IN THE LEAST', EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use 'in the least' after a negative form for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 否定强调短语：'in the least'的用法
examples: She has lost her little brother but that does not discourage her in the least.、Most of the times, the director of a television channel is not in the least interested in the quality, but only in the matter of how many people watch their programmes.、What others say doesn't matter in the least.
trigger_lemmas: in the least、not in the least、does not matter in the least、not interested in the least
keywords: in the least,否定强调,not in the least,丝毫不,语气加强

content: Guideword: USE: REFLECTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'how can' to reflect, through rhetorical questions.
chinese_human_name: 修辞性疑问句：how can 用于反思与质疑
examples: And how can we improve if we are not allowed to make mistakes, evaluate our experiences in a new light and try again?、But how can each of us stay fit in this world of stress and fast food restaurants?
trigger_lemmas: how can、how can we、how can you、how can it
keywords: how can,修辞性疑问句,反思,质疑,高级表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NEGATIVE WITH 'DIDN'T'. CanDo: Can use the negative form 'didn't dare' + infinitive without 'to' to talk about not being brave enough to do something.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词dare的否定形式：didn't dare + 不带to的不定式
examples: She didn't dare think about him and the possibility that he would never come back.、Since we didn't dare move our feet, we were slowly swaying to the left and to the right, backwards and forwards.
keywords: 情态动词,dare,否定形式,不带to的不定式,过去时态

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'be' + 'not' + adjective + 'to' + infinitive.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 否定表达：be not + 形容词 + to + 动词原形
examples: The country's population is not likely to increase fast enough.、[talking about relatives] You are not obliged to invite them over.、[talking about tourism] Its positive effects are not certain to outweigh the negative ones.
trigger_lemmas: be not likely to、be not obliged to、be not certain to
keywords: be not likely to,be not obliged to,be not certain to,否定表达,形容词+不定式

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'BE' + ADJECTIVE + 'NOT' + 'TO'. CanDo: Can use 'be' + adjective + 'not' + 'to' + infinitive for emphasis.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 强调性否定结构：be + 形容词 + not + to + 动词原形
examples: People should be obliged not to have more than a very small number of children otherwise they will be punished.、Now without her knowledge, I know everything about her and she is bound not to conceal the truth!、Indeed, whatever path parents choose, they are almost certain not to do a good job.、Be sure not to miss the alligator steak.
trigger_lemmas: be obliged not to、be bound not to、be certain not to、be sure not to
keywords: be动词,形容词,not to,动词原形,强调否定,正式语境

content: Guideword: USE: OBLIGATION. CanDo: Can use present and past forms of 'have to' + '-ed' to talk about obligations in the past.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词have to的过去完成式：had to have + 过去分词
examples: Nowadays, one has to have finished at least senior high school for any employer to consider hiring you.、The State Universities have a higher level of education than Public Universities, but usually to get into a State University you had to have been studying in a public school.
trigger_lemmas: had to have、didn't have to have、have to have
keywords: have to,obligation,past perfect,modal verb,necessity

content: Guideword: USE: DEDUCTIONS AND CONCLUSIONS. CanDo: Can use a range of present and past forms of 'have (got) to' to talk about deductions and conclusions.  ► must  ► had to
chinese_human_name: 情态动词have (got) to的推论与结论用法
examples: [talking about a castle on a small island] It's got to be incredible to see a castle emerging from the sea.、[wondering why his mother has suddenly decided to come to his house] There had to be something else since she was definitely not the kind of person who drops by without asking.、Yes, I was sure, it had to have been Peter.
keywords: 情态动词,推论,结论,逻辑推断,have got to,had to,must

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST. CanDo: Can use 'have to have' + '-ed'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词have to的过去形式：have to have + 过去分词
examples: [talking about urban versus rural life] In order to have an objective view on which lifestyle tends to be more problematic, you certainly have to have lived at each setting for a rather extensive time period.、They stop at the most famous places, which you "have to have seen", jump down and take photographs, always chatting with each other.
trigger_lemmas: have to have、has to have、had to have、must have
keywords: have to have,过去分词,情态动词,过去必要性,经历要求,must have对比

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'MAY AS WELL'. CanDo: Can use 'may as well' to talk about what we think is the easiest or most logical course of action, often when we cannot see a better alternative or when it will not spoil the situation if you do that thing. ► might
chinese_human_name: 情态动词短语：may as well（不妨/干脆）
examples: A few minutes later, she began hesitantly: "After all, you may as well know…”、I may as well see the other things.
trigger_lemmas: may as well、might as well、as well
keywords: may as well,might as well,情态动词短语,不妨,无奈选择

content: Guideword: USE: HEDGING. CanDo: Can use 'it may be' + '-ed' that as a hedging device when drawing conclusions and summarising, particularly in academic contexts.
chinese_human_name: 学术写作中的缓和表达：it may be + 过去分词 + that 从句
examples: On balance, it may be concluded that although international sports competitions do involve such factors as serious and physical strain and commercial gain, their ultimate aim remains unchanged - namely, to find out in a fair way who deserves the title of the winner.、It may be argued that a child's academic success is crucial to his or her future.、It may be argued that the career span of an athlete is quite short and therefore money earned is well deserved.
trigger_lemmas: it may be concluded、it may be argued、it may be suggested
keywords: 缓和表达,学术写作,过去分词,that从句,谨慎语气

content: Guideword: USE: CONCESSION. CanDo: Can use 'may' in a subordinate clause expressing concession with 'however', 'whatever', 'whoever' … + 'it or this may be or seem'.
chinese_human_name: 让步从句中的may：与however/whatever/whoever等连用的表达方式
examples: But honestly, I am sure that the price of the watch also contributes its part, however small it may be, to my love of it.、Nowadays, however useful it may seem, travel has proved to be pointless as far as broadening the mind is concerned.、The most important thing is that people enjoy what they are doing whatever it may be and wherever it takes place.、Nowadays, one of the main goals of people in society is to achieve success, in whatever field it may be.
keywords: 让步从句,may,however,whatever,whoever,may be,may seem

content: Guideword: USE: EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use 'try as I might' for emphasis at the beginning of a sentence.
chinese_human_name: 强调性倒装结构：Try as I might
examples: Try as I might, I was never able to persuade her to go for a walk.、Try as I might, I cannot imagine a world without music.、Try as I might, I can't see an explanation ….
trigger_lemmas: try as i might、as i might、try as
keywords: 倒装结构,强调语气,固定搭配,努力与结果反差,C2级别语法

content: Guideword: FORM: 'MIGHT AS WELL'. CanDo: Can use 'might as well', mostly to talk about or suggest what we think is the easiest or most logical course of action, often when we cannot see a better alternative. ► 'may'
chinese_human_name: 情态动词短语：might as well
examples: Living longer allows you to fulfil the different stages of your personal development, and if you reach the necessary maturity and integrity that corresponds to this stage of your life, you might as well make the best of these years.、What should be changed about travelling and spending one's holiday is that the people, in my opinion, should decide on what they want to do during their holidays: If they only want to have fun, they might as well stay at home.
trigger_lemmas: might as well、may as well、might just as well
keywords: 情态动词,短语,建议,妥协,替代行动

content: Guideword: FORM: ELLIPSIS. CanDo: Can use ellipted 'must have' + '-ed' without a subject. ► ellipsis
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must的省略结构：must have + -ed（无主语）
examples: [from a story] 'Must have fallen out of a car, or somfin'" This was his next thought.
keywords: 情态动词,must have,过去推测,省略结构,口语表达

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST, NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'must not have been' (especially with 'easy').
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must的过去否定形式：must not have been
examples: But I would like to stress that I was really happy that she found another husband, although she had three little children which must not have been easy for him.、Something I have missed on behalf of my father is a bit more tenderness, but again I am guessing it must not have been easy for him to be a post-wartime son of a widow.、It mustn't have been more than an hour after the first announcement of the captain that there was a second one.
trigger_lemmas: must not have been、mustn't have been、easy、more than
keywords: 情态动词,过去否定形式,否定推测,must not have been,困难情境

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use 'must' with a wide range of adverbs in the normal mid position after the modal verb. ► adverbs|
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must与副词搭配：副词在must后的中间位置用法
examples: There must certainly be other solutions to the problem of the need for space for new houses.、RECOMMENDATION In my opinion our town must clearly use this area to create a park and a playground for children.、I must completely disagree with this statement, since I believe that in all jobs or occupations only the good professionals are able to earn a lot of money.
keywords: 情态动词must,副词中间位置,语气增强,逻辑推断,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: INVERSION. CanDo: Can invert 'must' and the subject after negative phrases, e.g. 'not only', 'never', 'nor', to change the focus and give prominence/emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must的倒装用法：与否定短语连用强调
examples: Not only must you study really hard during university, but also keep studying afterwards.、To sum up, my opinion is that education is sacred, necessary and useful to all of us and never must it be characterised as "a waste of time".、[talking about personality] Nor must we overlook the human qualities.
keywords: 情态动词,倒装,否定短语,强调,正式语体

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词need的疑问句形式：Need you...?
examples: Need you ask?、Lastly I would appreciate , as I am sure others would too, if the premises were cleaner. Need I say more?
trigger_lemmas: need you、need i、need we、need i say more
keywords: 情态动词,疑问句,正式语境,Need you...?,Need I say more?

content: Guideword: USE: IN DISCUSSION. CanDo: Can use the question form rhetorically in discussion, typically in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词need的修辞性问句用法：在正式讨论中的反问表达
examples: Need I go on?、Need you work in this way?
keywords: 情态动词,修辞性问句,正式语境,need,反问表达

content: Guideword: FORM: CONTRACTED FORM, NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'oughtn't' (without 'to') + verb.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词ought的否定缩略形式：oughtn't + 动词原形
examples: …they will most certainly have a banquet that day... and you oughtn't miss it for the world!
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,缩略形式,oughtn't,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS, NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'ought' + subject + 'not to' + verb to form (rhetorical) questions, often in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词ought的否定疑问句：ought + 主语 + not to + 动词
examples: And if not, ought we not to learn from the mistakes of the past?
keywords: 情态动词ought,否定疑问句,正式语境,修辞疑问句,ought not to

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form 'ought not to'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词ought的否定形式：ought not to
examples: Secondly, there ought not to be a division between rich and poor.、We ought not to forget that in the last twenty years the food industry has increased the number of chemicals used in its products.
trigger_lemmas: ought not to、oughtn't to、ought not to be、ought not to forget
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,ought not to,正式语气,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: AFTER 'IF' CLAUSES. CanDo: Can use 'shall' in the main clause after an 'if-' clause  ► conditionals
examples: Nowadays people live longer than they did in the past, which is very nice and pleasant, but we must be careful because if things get out of hand, … we shall be doomed to live in complete chaos.、I have to inform you that if we do not receive a reply this time we shall take the matter to court.

content: Guideword: USE: PREDICTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'shall' to make predictions.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词shall：表示预测的用法
examples: As a result, our town shall have financial benefits, as people visiting the library will visit the city’s shops for their needs.、… we shall probably have several years more to live.
keywords: 情态动词,预测用法,正式语体,未来时态,确定性推断

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'AS' + PRONOUN, NARRATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'as' + pronoun + 'used to' … to add background to a narrative, often to highlight something unusual.
chinese_human_name: 叙事背景构建：'as' + 代词 + 'used to' 结构
examples: She had gone out for a walk in the woods as she used to do every Sunday, with her diary in her hand and a pen in her pocket.、He divorced his wife, old flabby Nellie as she used to call her, and proposed to her.、She married a well-off man, and ended up being a housewife, doing piecework for peanuts, as she used to say.
trigger_lemmas: as、used to、as she used to、as he used to
keywords: as,used to,叙事背景,过去习惯,代词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'USED NOT TO'. CanDo: Can use negative form 'used not to'
chinese_human_name: 情态动词used to的否定形式：used not to
examples: I used to play until late in the evening, I used not to do my homework and I did not excel at school.、As a teenager I used not to be very sociable, I had few friends and none of them felt close.
trigger_lemmas: used not to、usedn't to、as a child、in the past
keywords: used not to,否定形式,过去习惯,情态动词,对比表达

content: Guideword: USE: WILLFULNESS OR DISAPPROVAL. CanDo: Can use 'will' to talk about general behaviour, often disapprovingly.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词will：表示固执行为或不满情绪
examples: Indeed no one can imagine what children will do!
keywords: 情态动词,固执行为,不满语气,习惯性行为,批评表达

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use a wide range of adverbs with 'would', including 'undoubtedly', 'possibly', 'normally', 'personally', 'eventually', 'obviously', 'significantly', 'inevitably'. ► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would与副词搭配：高级表达方式
examples: [talking about the construction of a leisure centre] I believe that the construction of such a centre would undoubtedly contribute to the improvement of our quality of life.、Organising family-oriented activities would significantly increase membership and raise the society's popularity with the local community.
keywords: 情态动词would,副词修饰,假设语气,正式表达,would undoubtedly,would significantly

content: Guideword: FORM/USE, RESPONSE TOKENS. CanDo: Can use adverbs expressing certainty as short responses.
chinese_human_name: 副词表达确定性：简短回应用法
examples: Do I agree with this statement? Definitely.
keywords: 副词,确定性,简短回应,肯定回答,日常对话

content: Guideword: USE: SPECULATION. CanDo: Can use 'couldn’t have' + '-ed' to speculate about the past.
chinese_human_name: 推测过去不可能发生的事：couldn't have + 过去分词
examples: Imagine my dismay when I realised I hadn’t brought back the notebook from the pub. Surely I couldn't have left it on my seat.、[speculating about a lost diary] … her mother couldn't have hidden it there just like that. It just wasn't like her. She must have put it away there and then forgotten about it.
trigger_lemmas: couldn't have left、couldn't have hidden、couldn't have done
keywords: couldn't have,过去推测,不可能性,情态动词,过去分词

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE DUE TO'. CanDo: Can use the simple past form of 'be' + 'due to' to talk about scheduled events in the future from a point in the past.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future in the past
chinese_human_name: 过去时态中的未来安排：be due to 的过去式用法
examples: It was quite early in the morning, only 7.15 am, and my plane was due to leave in about 40 minutes.、Ten minutes after the time we were due to begin, she arrived.、We have succeeded in persuading the local Council that the factory that was due to be built near the lake was dangerous.
trigger_lemmas: was due to、were due to、due to be
keywords: 过去时态,未来安排,预定事件,时间参照,被动语态

content: Guideword: USE: ASSUMPTIONS. CanDo: Can use the future perfect continuous to make assumptions about the present.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 将来完成进行时：基于假设推测现在情况
examples: I do not think that this aspect is really necessary because it is supposed that … you will have been studying very hard to occupy that job ….
trigger_lemmas: will have been、by then、for hours、all night
keywords: 将来完成进行时,推测现在,持续动作,假设推理,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form of the future perfect simple.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 将来完成时疑问句：Will he have changed?
examples: Will he have changed?
keywords: 将来完成时,疑问句,过去分词,时间状语,by短语

content: Guideword: USE: LONG-TERM INTENTIONS WITH 'SHALL'. CanDo: Can use 'shall' to talk about long-term intentions.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future simple (with will and shall)
chinese_human_name: 用shall表达长期意图：高级用法详解
examples: I must believe, believe in myself and in everybody else, and mainly in what I look for, this way I shall never lose hope.、I shall always remember it as the city of lights.、I shall always keep it in mind, in order to keep my children close to me and avoid being hated.、I came to the conclusion that the Excel Academy is not worth the money our company paid and that we shall not send further candidates there.
trigger_lemmas: shall always、shall never、shall continue to、shall remain
keywords: shall,长期意图,正式承诺,个人信念,庄重语气,第一人称,未来时态

content: Guideword: USE: PREDICTIONS WITH 'SHALL'. CanDo: Can use 'shall' to make predictions, usually in formal contexts.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future simple (with will and shall)
chinese_human_name: 正式语境下的预测用法：shall 表示预测
examples: Once more I invite you wholeheartedly to stay at my place and I hope we shall meet in November.、… we shall probably have several years more to live.
keywords: shall,预测,正式语境,将来时,第一人称

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use 'be' + 'going to' with a wide range of adverbs before the main verb.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future with be going to
chinese_human_name: 将来时be going to结构：与副词连用的灵活表达
examples: But I don't know if I'm going to still live here.、First, I am going to briefly introduce the three main activities offered by the club.、Nobody is going to even look at you when your sister is there.
keywords: be going to,副词位置,将来时,方式副词,程度副词

content: Guideword: FORM: INVERSION WITH 'ONLY WHEN'. CanDo: Can use the present simple with 'only when' (followed by 'will' and inverted subject) to refer to the future.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: present simple for future use
chinese_human_name: 倒装结构：'only when'引导的现在简单式表将来
examples: Only when we understand that, will we be able to live in better societies.、Moreover, I think that only when people manage this will they be able to move on with their lives and offer something new to humanity.、And, sadly, I also believe that only when something really catastrophic happens will citizens face reality and accept that measures must be taken.
keywords: only when,现在简单式,倒装,将来时,条件从句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NOT A' + NOUN. CanDo: Can use 'Not a' + noun with a passive verb or inverted auxiliary and subject for focus.
chinese_human_name: 强调否定结构：'Not a' + 名词 + 被动动词/倒装结构
examples: Not a word was spoken by anyone throughout the journey.、Not a scrap of remorse do they have.
trigger_lemmas: not a word、not a scrap、not a sound、not a trace
keywords: Not a,被动语态,倒装结构,强调否定,正式语境

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THE' + PREMODIFIER + 'THING, FACT etc.' + 'IS (THAT)'. CanDo: Can use 'The' + premodifier + 'thing, fact, point, problem or reason' + 'is (that)' for focus.
chinese_human_name: 强调句型：'The + 修饰语 + 名词 + is (that)' 结构
examples: The sad thing about it was that it was actually Richard who said, "Why don't you go on holiday?”、The strange thing was that the noise reminded her of someone making a cup of tea.、The sad fact is, poverty is very likely to pass down to the next generation in these situations.、The relevant point is that that personal, almost intimate relationship between the possessor and the thing possessed is at the core of that particular love we all hold for certain things.、The only problem is that they are a little too noisy in the night.
trigger_lemmas: the thing is、the fact is、the point is、the problem is、the reason is
keywords: 强调结构,焦点句型,修饰语,焦点名词,that从句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WH-'CLEFT  CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'How', 'Why', or 'Where' cleft clauses as subject, for focus
chinese_human_name: WH-分裂句：How/Why/Where引导的强调结构
examples: How we are brought up forms our character, our thinking and our attitude towards ourselves and towards everybody and everything around us.、Where he had gone to was a mystery.、How they influenced my life is hard to tell.、Why I think my father is successful is because of his personality, he is very fair about everything,; for example if he sees two beautiful women walking down the street and you ask him which is the nicest of them, he couldn't tell even if one was plain ugly he couldn't.、[talking about possessions] How people have got their objects is also important.
keywords: WH-分裂句,强调结构,How引导,Why引导,Where引导,主语从句,焦点

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IT' CLEFT. CanDo: Can use 'It' + 'be' + noun + 'that' clause for focus.
chinese_human_name: 强调句型：It is/was...that/who...
examples: It is Lily who decides to go to the seaside and it is also her who kills the turkey given by a lorry-driver.、It was Paul who stole the money.、It is Piggy who finds the conch and knows how to blow it.、It is my mother who always plays the role of mediator.、It is this silence that gives me the impression of togetherness, for which no words are needed.
keywords: It-cleft sentence,强调句型,被强调部分,that从句,焦点结构

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: MULTIPLE FIXED EXPRESSIONS. CanDo: Can use more than one fixed expression in the front position for added focus.
chinese_human_name: 前置多重固定表达：增强句子焦点
examples: But all of a sudden, out of nowhere a bunch of people came running towards him, yelling something he couldn't understand.、All in all, taking everything into account, I would suggest that a leisure centre would be the most beneficial as it provides all the facilities necessary to attract and benefit a number of people in the community.、What is more, from my point of view happiness has nothing to do with big things but with small things such as day-to-day details.
trigger_lemmas: all of a sudden、out of nowhere、all in all、taking everything into account、what is more、from my point of view
keywords: 前置位置,固定表达,焦点增强,逗号分隔,逻辑连贯

content: Guideword: USE: 'THIS', IN NARRATIVES. CanDo: Can use 'this' with nouns and noun phrases in a narrative to create a sense of immediacy.
chinese_human_name: 指示词'this'在叙事中的运用：营造即时感
examples: [talking about two characters in a story] There's this flame of passion between them.、It's a story where there's this old man who makes a marionette that comes to life.、In our group there was this girl, tiny and fragile, very sensitive; she had a special way with words.
trigger_lemmas: there is this、there was this、i met this、where there's this
keywords: 指示词,叙事,即时感,生动性,存在句型

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THIS' WITH NOUN AND POSSESSIVE. CanDo: Can use 'this' + noun + 'of' + possessive pronoun to highlight something, often in a positive way.
chinese_human_name: 指示词强调结构：this + 名词 + of + 物主代词
examples: What is more, not only is this rare talent of theirs used for public pleasure but also for international sports success, which makes us all proud.、This characteristic of his is shown in every situation of his life.
trigger_lemmas: this talent of、this characteristic of、this ability of、this quality of
keywords: 指示词,物主代词,强调结构,正式表达,抽象名词

content: Guideword: USE: EMOTIONAL DISTANCE. CanDo: Can use 'that' and 'those' to convey emotional distance, often to express disapproval.
chinese_human_name: 指示代词that/those的情感距离用法：表达不赞同或疏远
examples: I also told her that if I had been in her shoes, I would not have put up with that sort of behaviour.、Nowadays, celebrities, like pop stars or football players, are often worshipped by hysterical crowds of fans who can't see through the mask that those so-called heroes make up to sell the product that they are.
trigger_lemmas: that sort of、those so-called、that kind of、that behaviour
keywords: 指示代词,情感距离,不赞同,批评,疏远

content: Guideword: FORM: SINGULAR NOUN ENDING IN 'S' + APOSTROPHE. CanDo: Can use an apostrophe after singular nouns ending in 's', to indicate possession.
chinese_human_name: 单数名词以's'结尾的所有格：加撇号表示所属关系
examples: However, I believe that in order to maintain its popularity, the programme should keep some of the series' aspects the same, but alter some others.
keywords: 所有格,撇号,单数名词,以's'结尾,所属关系

content: Guideword: FORM: ''S + 'S'. CanDo: Can use two possessive ''s' constructions in the same noun phrase.
chinese_human_name: 双重所有格结构：连续使用两个's
examples: There were no photographs of him in Ann 's mother's albums.、They spent two weeks together at Emily's grandmother's house, after fourteen months of dating.
keywords: 双重所有格,possessive 's,名词短语,所属关系,家庭关系

content: Guideword: FORM: ''S' WITH ELLIPTED NOUN. CanDo: Can use ''s' without a following noun when the noun has already been mentioned or is obvious in the context.
chinese_human_name: 所有格's省略名词用法：上下文明确时的省略结构
examples: Olivia's experiences probably are the narrator's.、He started to shake me and meanwhile I heard a familiar voice; it was my father's.、Suddenly, after two weeks I realised that my bank account was empty and so was my friend's.
keywords: 所有格's,省略名词,上下文明确,避免重复,名词性所有格

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'MANY A' WITH SINGULAR NOUNS, FOR FOCUS. CanDo: Can use 'many a' or 'many an' + singular noun for emphasis and focus.
chinese_human_name: 强调性数量表达：'many a' + 单数名词
examples: We have come a long way and climbed many a mountain but are we really better off than our ancestors?、Her father's pharmacy was broken into very often, the local drug addicts were relentless and Mary was threatened many a time on her way home from work.、It has raised many an issue which I would like to comment upon here.
keywords: many a,many an,单数名词,强调表达,正式语气

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NEITHER'. CanDo: Can use 'Neither' or 'Nor' + inverted auxiliary or 'be' + subject to add to a previous related negative clause, to focus on an additional negative factor.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词倒装结构：Neither/Nor + 助动词/be动词 + 主语
examples: Nevertheless, I have no recollection of ever leaving my diary. In fact, I can clearly remember that I kept it with me all the time I was working. Neither do I remember losing it during the time I was on the platform waiting for my train to pull in.、Maybe he will eventually get over this terrible experience, but he's bound to be a lonelier boy than he was. Nor does Jack's future look any more promising.、There are also considerable disturbances during day-time. It is, for example, not possible to lead a conversation, e.g. on the veranda, without shouting. Nor is it possible to watch television peacefully without the thunderous noise in the background.、At first, I didn’t pay attention to the large number of magazines and newspapers she subscribed to. Neither did I oppose her 'need' to get new clothes every month.
keywords: 倒装结构,并列连词,否定追加,时态一致,主谓倒装

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'AND YET', CONCESSIVE. CanDo: Can use 'And yet' to combine sentences to introduce a contrast, often unexpected, sometimes in a formal context.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词：'And yet' 的让步对比用法
examples: If I had, I would try to do the best for them, just like my parents did, and very likely I would make the same mistakes. And yet, I think I would be a good and loving father.、I felt very embarrassed and I was sure I would get the sack. And yet the manager forgave me and I continued to work there.
keywords: 并列连词,让步关系,对比转折,正式语境,出乎意料

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IN THAT'. CanDo: Can use 'in that' as a subordinating conjunction, to give greater in-depth explanation, often in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 从属连词：'in that'的深入解释用法
examples: Nowadays it is widely argued that professional sports are damaging to people's health in that they involve gruelling training sessions as an integral part of the occupation.、It's often said that nowadays people must be proud of medical advances, in that life is getting considerably longer.
keywords: 从属连词,正式语境,深入解释,句型结构,原因阐明

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'SO ...  AS TO', FORMAL. CanDo: Can use 'so' + adjective + 'as' + 'to'-infinitive clause, usually in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 正式比较结构：so...as to 句型
examples: Travellers should not be so ignorant as to think they can understand other nationalities better when they have once lived in one of their hotels.、However, as soon as my glaring eyes met his, beseeching and helpless, I knew I couldn't endure being so cruel as to deny him my caring shoulder...、Should I be so fortunate as to win the scholarship, I would use it in a way that would not only affect me, but very much so also the area in which I live.
trigger_lemmas: so...as to、so fortunate as to、so ignorant as to、so cruel as to
keywords: so...as to,正式比较结构,程度结果表达,不定式从句,形容词修饰

content: Guideword: FORM: 'AS IF' + NON-FINITE CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'as if' + non-finite clause to introduce a second clause as a comparison.
chinese_human_name: 比较从句：'as if' + 非限定从句
examples: She closed her eyes as if to push those thoughts away.、There it was: the chef's body, hacked to pieces, a carving knife in his hand as if to scare off an enemy.、I was so frightened that my heart was beating like crazy as if trying to leave my body.、Because of this, my mother never denied us anything, as if trying to compensate for our father's death.
trigger_lemmas: as if、as if to、as if doing
keywords: as if,非限定从句,不定式,现在分词,比较结构

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NEGATIVE CLAUSE +  'NOR', FOCUS. CanDo: Can combine a negative clause with an inverted clause with 'nor', to give focus.
chinese_human_name: 否定句与倒装句的nor连接：强调结构
examples: That night Kevin did not sleep; nor did Kristin.、They do not have any hobbies, nor do they have friends or relatives (at least not where they live).、Her diary was never found, nor was Juliette.、I should never have agreed to meet him, after all I didn't know the man nor did I understand what he was talking about, but he really said my friend Peter was in danger, that's what made me say yes.
keywords: nor,倒装,否定句,强调结构,正式语体

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'LET' + THIRD PERSON PRONOUN, DEVOLVING RESPONSIBILITY. CanDo: Can use an imperative clause with 'let' + 'him/her/them' + base form of a main verb, to devolve responsibility.
chinese_human_name: 祈使句：'let' + 第三人称代词 + 动词原形（转移责任用法）
examples: Let them find their own food.、But she put aside her friends because she didn't want to be pitied. After few attempts her friends gave up."Let her live alone".、So let them be and let them scrutinize the peculiar events that do occur in life.
keywords: 祈使句,责任转移,let,第三人称代词,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'DON'T YOU …'. CanDo: Can use you with an imperative form to make an instruction stronger.
chinese_human_name: 强调型祈使句：'Don't you ...' 结构
examples: Don't you ever do that again!、Don't you dare!、Don't you dare forget me, I want letters from you promptly, understand!
trigger_lemmas: don't you、don't you ever、don't you dare
keywords: 祈使句,否定形式,语气增强,主语 you,非正式用语

content: Guideword: FORM: 'HOW' + CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'How' + clause.
chinese_human_name: 感叹句结构：'How' + 从句
examples: How I often longed to play with the other children or relax with a good book.、How I love the smell of home!、How I long to be there again.
trigger_lemmas: how i long、how i love、how i miss、how i wish
keywords: 感叹句,How从句,情感表达,书面语,强烈情感

content: Guideword: FORM: 'HOW' + ADVERB + CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'How' + adverb + clause.
chinese_human_name: 感叹句结构：How + 副词 + 从句
examples: How differently we were brought up by our mother.
keywords: 感叹句,副词,从句,方式副词,情感表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WERE' + PRONOUN + 'TO' INFINITIVE, FORMAL. CanDo: Can use 'Were' + pronoun + 'to' infinitive to introduce a condition, in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 正式条件句：Were + 代词 + to + 动词原形
examples: Were I to choose one of them, I would select the last one, so that I could have the opportunity to take part in my favourite radio station's programme.、Were you to need any further information, please do not hesitate to contact me.、Were we to give them this opportunity, it would not only be a great advantage for them but for the future of our society as well.、Were they to be paid a sufficient sum, say, equivalent or even more than their current pay-check, they would be inclined to give up their jobs.
trigger_lemmas: were i to、were you to、were he to、were we to、were they to
keywords: 倒装条件句,正式假设,虚拟语气,were to结构,条件从句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NON-FINITE AFTER 'ALTHOUGH', 'THOUGH'. CanDo: Can use non-finite clauses after subordinating conjunctions '(although, though)', to express contrast.
chinese_human_name: 从属连词后接非谓语从句：although/though + 非谓语结构
examples: I was my parents' first and only child, and I was brought up at my grandparents' home, because, although married, my mother decided not to leave her parents' home, and my father agreed with her.、Although committed to her job she successfully maintains her social contacts all over the world.、Jack, though disappointed, respects the result.
keywords: 从属连词,非谓语从句,对比表达,although,though

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: INVERTED PAST PERFECT, IMAGINED PAST. CanDo: Can use past perfect +  inverted subject, and a modal verb + 'have' + '-ed' in the main clause  to talk about imagined situations in the past.
chinese_human_name: 倒装过去完成时：表达对过去情况的虚拟假设
examples: Had he been more experienced he would have known that these things always happen in this part of the world.、Had we known this fact we would have organised more activities within school hours.、Had we learnt from the mistakes of the past, we would have given up fighting each other a long time ago.、Had I known so many people from abroad were coming to visit our stand, I would have studied harder during my private lessons in the past.、Had this file fallen into enemy hands, it might have had disastrous effects on the Western world.、Had public transportation been an option I would have chosen that instead of my car.
keywords: 倒装过去完成时,虚拟语气,情态动词,过去假设,条件从句

content: Guideword: USE: INVERTED 'SHOULD', FUTURE, POSSIBLE OUTCOME, FORMAL, POLITE. CanDo: Can use inverted 'should', + 'would' in the main clause to talk about possible future outcomes, in polite or formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 倒装式'Should'条件句：表达未来可能性与礼貌请求
examples: Should we win your prize we would like to build a new school close to our production center, for the children of the area.、Should you fail to do so, we would have no choice but to take further action.
keywords: 倒装条件句,Should倒装,未来可能性,正式语境,礼貌请求

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WERE IT NOT FOR', FORMAL. CanDo: Can use 'Were it not for' + noun phrase to introduce conditions in formal contexts. ► past simple
chinese_human_name: 正式条件句：Were it not for + 名词短语
examples: Were it not for my university, I would give up this class immediately.、Were it not for that kind of toy, children would be able to gain more team-spirit, creativity and self-confidence.、In fact, were it not for that reason, Laura would have accepted the comfortable executive chair in a big company.
trigger_lemmas: were it not for、formal condition、noun phrase
keywords: 正式条件句,虚拟语气,倒装结构,名词短语,过去时态

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: INVERTED 'WERE' + 'TO' INFINITIVE, FORMAL. CanDo: Can use 'were' with an inverted subject + 'to' infinitive, to introduce conditions in formal contexts. ► past simple
chinese_human_name: 正式条件句：倒装were + to不定式
examples: Were I to win this travel scholarship, the country of my choice would be Japan.、Were you to compare people's views on animals to their views on food, you would find many similarities.、Were someone to decide that he did not want to go to university, he would have to face the consequences of his choice.、Were this suggestion to be put into practice, our town's personality would change completely from a small town to a port of call for a large number of visitors.
trigger_lemmas: were to、were i to、were you to、were there to be
keywords: 倒装条件句,were to,正式语境,假设条件,虚拟语气

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: SUBORDINATING CONJUNCTIONS, CONDITIONS. CanDo: Can use conditional subordinate clauses with a range of conjunctions ('so long as', 'on condition that', 'in the event that') with past, present or future reference.|
chinese_human_name: 条件状语从句：使用so long as/on condition that/in the event that等从属连词
examples: As a matter of fact, education is free and as a result they can attend whichever university they desire so long as they have the proper qualifications, of course.、I was allowed to bring my friends home and go out with them on condition that my parents knew where I was and when I was going to return.
trigger_lemmas: so long as、on condition that、in the event that
keywords: 条件状语从句,从属连词,so long as,on condition that,in the event that

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IF IT WERE NOT FOR', FORMAL. CanDo: Can use 'If it weren’t / were not for' + noun phrase to introduce conditions in formal contexts. ► past simple
chinese_human_name: 正式条件句：If it weren't/were not for + 名词短语
examples: If it weren't for that boy, I am definitely certain that I would have failed the examinations and I would have ended up taking the class again the following year.、If it weren't for his determination, he would have resigned when he first heard "no".
trigger_lemmas: if it weren't for、if it were not for、were not for
keywords: 条件句,虚拟语气,正式语境,名词短语,过去假设

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IF IT WERE' + 'TO'-INFINITIVE FORM, FORMAL. CanDo: Can use 'If it were' + 'to-' infinitive to introduce conditions in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 正式条件句：If it were + to不定式
examples: If it were to be published, the first issue would probably include a small introduction about the people who helped in the creation of the magazine.、However displacing such a number of commuters will need a lot of planning and a very good infrastructure if it were to succeed.
trigger_lemmas: if it were to、were to、to be、to succeed
keywords: 条件句,虚拟语气,正式语境,to不定式,假设条件

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WHETHER OR NOT', FORMAL. CanDo: Can use 'whether or not' to introduce conditions in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 正式语境条件从句：whether or not 的用法
examples: Whether or not the visitors should imitate local customs and behaviour is definitely a debatable issue.、Whether or not it is better to educate boys and girls in separate schools has been a widely discussed issue in recent years.、Whether or not richer countries should help these poor nations is a very controversial issue, there are people on both sides of the argument who have very strong feelings.、However, it depends only on the children whether or not they'll go to a university and there are many factors to be considered before deciding on going.
trigger_lemmas: whether or not、depend on whether、debate whether
keywords: whether or not,条件从句,正式语境,全面条件,debate whether or not

content: Guideword: USE: DISTANCING. CanDo: Can use adverbs mid clause, to distance the writer from what they are saying.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 副词中置：表达距离感的写作技巧
examples: He came out from school at the age of 16, and joined the "Universidad xxx" - the best one in Chile, supposedly - to study Economics、The author of the letter apparently has no experience of being a parent in our times.、He was quite nice to me, surprisingly and he told him that he would do his best but that the music was not too loud.
keywords: 副词中置,距离感,不确定性,客观写作,正式语境

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: MID POSITION, DISTANCING. CanDo: Can use adverbs in mid position, to distance the writer from what they are saying.
chinese_human_name: 副词中位用法：表达距离感的写作技巧
examples: In all actuality Piggy himself theoretically has all the necessary character traits and skills at his disposal that would ensure he would be an effective leader.、For the houses opposite the cargo area we strongly support the idea of a "green" wall, as it was mentioned in the report of the town council but surprisingly seems to have been forgotten afterwards.
keywords: 副词中位,距离感,客观表达,正式写作,助动词位置

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: FRONT POSITION, INVERSION, WITH 'HARDLY'. CanDo: Can use 'hardly' in front position followed by an inverted subject and verb, to give focus.
chinese_human_name: 副词hardly前置倒装结构：强调“刚……就……”
examples: Hardly had he reached his front door when he heard the phone ringing.、Hardly had she finished her complaints when Bob stood up, paid and left.、Hardly had they arrived when they saw a sleek, black car leaving the house's yard.
keywords: hardly,倒装,when,过去完成时,强调结构

content: Guideword: FORM: PRE- AND POST-MODIFIED ADVERBS. CanDo: Can form adverb phrases with modifiers before, and complements after, adverbs.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverb phrases - form
chinese_human_name: 副词短语的修饰结构：前置修饰语与后置补足语
examples: Many politicians and owners of big enterprises have been able for a long time to work almost exclusively for their own interests.、It was so completely in harmony with the sun, the sea, the sand, the summer, I decided instantly that was the kind of thing I would like to keep and collect.
trigger_lemmas: so completely、almost exclusively、in harmony with、for a long time
keywords: 副词短语,前置修饰语,后置补足语,程度副词,介词短语

content: Guideword: USE: FOCUS. CanDo: Can use a list of adjectives in ellipted clauses before and after a noun, to give focus. ► focus
chinese_human_name: 形容词列表在省略从句中的聚焦用法：名词前后的省略结构
examples: Imaginative, good-humoured, friendly, he was respected and liked by his peer-students.、The latter – fat, ugly and sick – blows his top when Ralph tells the others about the fat boy's nice name, as he wanted to keep it secret.
trigger_lemmas: imaginative, good-humoured, friendly、fat, ugly and sick、ellipted clauses、focus structure
keywords: 形容词列表,省略从句,焦点强调,前置修饰,后置补充

content: Guideword: FORM: COMBINING MULTIPLE ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can combine more complex, lengthy strings of adjectives, joining the last two adjectives with 'and'.
chinese_human_name: 复杂形容词串组合：用'and'连接最后两个形容词
examples: A timid, shy, self-conscious, over-sensitive and vulnerable person can yearn to make friends with someone who is very self-assured, confident, decisive, even bossy.、In the increasingly materialistic, greedy and shallow society we live in today, it would almost seem that there are no disadvantages to being rich.
trigger_lemmas: timid, shy, self-conscious, over-sensitive and vulnerable、materialistic, greedy and shallow、self-assured, confident, decisive, even bossy
keywords: 形容词串,连接词,复杂描述,高级写作,逗号分隔

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'NO' OR 'NOT ANY'. CanDo: Can use 'no' / 'not any' with comparative adjectives to limit the scale of comparison. ► comparative clauses
chinese_human_name: 比较级与否定词搭配：'no'/'not any' + 比较级形容词
examples: That is why we are not any happier than you were.、I will probably find the water to be no higher than my thighs.
keywords: 比较级,否定词,no,not any,than结构

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'NOT THAT MUCH'. CanDo: Can use 'not that much' to modify comparative adjectives to a small degree. ► comparative clauses
chinese_human_name: 比较级修饰语：not that much 的用法
examples: Although she is not that much older than I am, one could think there were quite a few years between us.
keywords: not that much,比较级,修饰语,程度限制,比较从句

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPARISON. CanDo: Can use adjectives in 'as … as' and 'so … that' in comparative structures. ► comparative clauses
chinese_human_name: 形容词比较结构：as...as与so...that的用法
examples: Because our debates do not draw as large a number of students as the guest appearances, but are still enjoyed by a relevant number of students, we propose a change of focus for the events.、It was such a riddle that I went and saw my psycho-analyst, who revealed to me that I once had so strong a shock that I was now walking and hiding my money in my sleep.
keywords: as...as,so...that,比较从句,形容词修饰,程度表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: DEGREE ADJECTIVES BEFORE NOUNS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of adjectives before a noun to express intensity.
chinese_human_name: 程度形容词前置：在名词前使用形容词表达强度
examples: As a conclusion, I shall say that the major problem concerns the exam.、It is located in the very centre of Pisa, in a magnificent ancient building.
keywords: 程度形容词,前置修饰,名词强度,强化词,形容词顺序

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'SLIGHTEST', 'FAINTEST'. CanDo: Can use 'the slightest', 'the faintest' with a specific range of nouns to express the least amount possible, most frequently following a negative verb form.
chinese_human_name: 最高级否定表达：the slightest/the faintest 的用法
examples: I should not end my relationship with Alex by phone, without giving him the slightest explanation.、They act as consumers, nothing more, and never show the slightest interest in learning and sharing opinions with the locals.、I haven't the faintest idea.
keywords: 最高级,否定表达,抽象名词,固定搭配,程度强调
